text.title: agents-memory-system Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agents-memory-system as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Storing all conversation history in the system prompt without summarization or relevance filtering.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: History grows linearly with iterations. At 30+ steps the system prompt alone exceeds most model context limits. The agent then silently truncates or fails. Summarize every 10-20 steps and recall only what is relevant.

failure-mode.description: Using CrewAI agent "memory" without configuring a persistent vector store across runs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: CrewAI agent memory is not persistent across runs by default. Without a configured vector store backend, the agent loses all learned context when the process restarts.
